title: CC: Eureka
description: Control your VS: Eureka ships using CC: Tweaked computers!
body:
> This mod only adds controlling functions to your Eureka Ship and therefore does not offer many functions for getting ship information. It's intended to be used together with [CC: VS](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-vs)

This project aims to fill the gap that oppened up when the [Valkyrien Computers](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-computers) was sunset in favor of the [CC: VS](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-vs). Unfortunately this new mod no longer offered the capability to control your Valkyrien Skies: Eureka airships using computers. To address this I have added a new peripheral for the Eureka ShipHelm with functions to control the ship.

Documentation of all of the provided functions can be found [here](https://codeberg.org/fiona06/cc_eureka/wiki/Home).
